name: GenieInput
description: Input schema for creating or updating a genie.

description.description: Human-readable description of the genie's purpose.

folder_id.description: ID of the folder to place this genie in.

instructions.description: Natural language instructions that guide the genie's behavior.

ai_provider.description: The AI model provider to use (e.g., openai, anthropic).

shared_account_id.description: ID of the shared account for AI provider credentials.

custom_oauth_key_id.description: ID of the custom OAuth profile for AI provider authentication.

matrix.description: Additional configuration matrix for the genie.
